creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=cbe9438cfe07adfbcdeafe8e363614f83b03a055

commit cbe9438cfe07adfbcdeafe8e363614f83b03a055

Author:     Dimitry Andric <dim@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-05-05 17:37:33 +0000
Commit:     Dimitry Andric <dim@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-06-22 18:22:35 +0000

    Merge llvm-project release/16.x llvmorg-16.0.3-0-gda3cd333bea5

    This updates llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and
    openmp to llvmorg-16.0.3-0-gda3cd333bea5 (aka 16.0.3 release).

    PR:             271047
    MFC after:      1 month
